reviews.review_description:
I've never seen a live event before in a gtag fan game 
It's going out on August 23rd 2024 this is abt to be crzy

this game is really fun! i liked how u designed it and i love the aesthetic and the movement! i love the parkour and im going to check out the other game modes! i am definitely knowing they’re going to be the best game modes in all of gorilla tag fan games ever! this game is really cool and i love it! and not to beg but, can i have mod/admin? 

       -Sincerely, BBOhio
best monkey jumpers game very bouncy fun !!!!
